summary: Iteration 43: Complete testing of weapon sorting in loadout builder and improved shopping route planner. All backend tests passed (9/9). Frontend weapon sorting works correctly with DPS/Ammo sort cycling (desc→asc→off). Shopping route planner correctly avoids gate jumps - Stanton stores visited before jumping to Pyro. Legs include 'type' field (quantum/jump). All other pages verified unchanged.

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing weapons, ships, and store locations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 verified: (1) Weapon sorting in LoadoutBuilder works - DPS/Ammo sort buttons cycle desc→asc→off correctly, DPS tags (cyan) and Ammo tags (green) visible on weapon cards using item.ammo || item.max_ammo. (2) Shopping route planner correctly avoids gate jumps - uses _travel_cost() with 200 Mkm penalty for gate jumps, so same-system stores are visited before jumping. Legs have 'type' field (quantum/jump), jump legs rendered in orange. All 9 backend pytest tests passed, all frontend pages unchanged.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. Both features working as specified.
